title: Bee Removal in Midtown Manhattan | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Midtown Manhattan. Safe, effective hive extraction for commercial and residential properties. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service.
intro: Midtown Manhattan's dense concentration of office buildings, residential high-rises, and historic structures creates unique challenges for bee infestations. From rooftop hives near Bryant Park to swarms around Times Square, our specialized bee removal team provides safe, humane extraction services throughout Midtown. We protect both the vital bee populations and your property with expert care.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience handling bee removal in Midtown's challenging urban environment, including high-rise buildings and commercial complexes. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly methods to safely relocate bees while ensuring complete protection for your property and occupants.
localContext: Midtown's iconic skyscrapers, rooftop gardens, and window boxes from 34th to 59th Street attract bee colonies seeking urban nesting sites. The area's mix of Rockefeller Center, Grand Central Terminal, and thousands of office buildings requires specialized expertise to handle bee removal without disrupting business operations or pedestrian traffic.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee emergency in Midtown Manhattan?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for bee removal emergencies in Midtown. For urgent situations involving large swarms near high-traffic areas or building entrances, we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours during business hours.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 bee removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe removal of the hive and all bees, treatment of the affected area, and preventative measures to discourage future infestations. The final cost depends on hive location, size, and accessibility within your Midtown property.

faqs.question: Can you remove bees from high-rise buildings in Midtown?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in bee removal from high-rise buildings throughout Midtown Manhattan. Our team has the equipment and expertise to safely access rooftops, terraces, window ledges, and ventilation systems in commercial and residential towers.

faqs.question: Do you relocate the bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bees to appropriate habitats outside the city where they can continue their important pollination work. We only use extermination as a last resort when relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or hive condition.
